name: Pancolour Ink Co., Ltd.
summary: Pancolour Ink Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells UV curable inks, coatings, and adhesives in Taiwan. It offers UV curable printing inks for IC chips, optical discs, plastics, and paper products; UV curable adhesives for bonding needs of metal, glass, and other materials that are applied in handicraft and electronic industries; and UV curable coatings for use in plastic flexible tubes and paper spot varnish for screen print, etc. The company provides its products under the PANOVA, PANCURE, PANOLEN, and RADITHO names. Pancolour Ink Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
